top_signals.title: Stocks Fall on Korean Chip Selloff, Oil Declines: Markets Wrap
top_signals.summary: Equities fell as a selloff in chip stocks spread to South Korea, reviving concerns the blistering rally in artificial intelligence shares this year may have gone too far, too fast. Brent slipped to the lowest since before the start of the Middle East war.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Yen Edges Higher With Traders on Alert for Risk of Intervention
top_signals.summary: The yen strengthened slightly against the dollar Thursday amid speculation that further intervention by Japan to bolster the currency may come without warning from officials.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Amazon is designing its own AI chips for Echo, Fire TV and future devices, exec tells CNBC
top_signals.summary: Amazon hardware chief Panos Panay says the company is designing custom chips for key devices as it experiments with AI gadgets.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Volkswagen braces for boardroom showdown over historic cost-cutting plan
top_signals.summary: Volkswagen is poised for a boardroom showdown following reports that the auto giant is weighing up shutting four factories and implementing 100,000 job cuts.
